task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the specified Jitsi Meet room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/InterpreterBooth42' or the meeting UI displays the room name 'InterpreterBooth42'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the display name to 'Interpreter_ES'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pre-join screen or the meeting UI shows the display name 'Interpreter_ES' being entered or actively set.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the Sounds settings in Jitsi Meet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Settings dialog is open in the Jitsi Meet interface, and the 'Sounds' tab or section is selected.

task_completion.description: The agent disabled the required notification sounds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes or toggles for 'Participant Joined', 'Participant Left', and 'Reaction Sounds' are visibly unchecked or disabled in the settings menu.

task_completion.description: The agent ensured 'Talk While Muted' remains enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle for 'Talk While Muted' is visibly checked or enabled in the settings menu.

task_completion.description: The agent saved a screenshot of the meeting view to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., scrot, import, gnome-screenshot) or a GUI screenshot tool is visible executing a capture and saving it to '/tmp/task_sounds_final.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet GUI in a web browser to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the actual Jitsi Meet web interface rather than using API calls or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI to modify settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using browser developer tools (Console/Application tabs) or terminal commands to directly inject values into the Redux state or local storage.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely captured a screenshot of the meeting view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot command or tool is used properly, rather than the agent creating a text file named .png or copying an unrelated image to the target path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet instance runs locally at http://localhost:8080. The target room name is 'InterpreterBooth42' and the expected display name is 'Interpreter_ES'. The agent must use the Jitsi Meet Settings UI to configure four specific sound settings: it must disable 'Participant Joined', 'Participant Left', and 'Reaction Sounds', while keeping 'Talk While Muted' enabled.
